title: andropogon rufus var. exarmatus
intro: Andropogon rufus var. exarmatus, also known as the Red Broom Grass or Red Grana Grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the genus Andropogon. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Andropogon rufus var. exarmatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
